title: Future Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Future Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Future Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Future Retail:
Future Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Future Retail!
